name: Corruption Sovereign
tool: blender-mcp via Claude Code (port 9877, parallel session)

polish_details.material_upgrade: procedural PBR (noise/voronoi textures, color ramps, bump, emission)
polish_details.lighting: boss studio (cold desaturated key, deep purple underglow, white-violet rim)

style_guide_alignment.void_body: Near-black void base reads as ultimate dark influence
style_guide_alignment.corrupt_armor: Deep violet armor with metallic sheen — regal corruption
style_guide_alignment.corrupt_crown: Multi-spike crown — anti-thesis of hero's single golden crown spike
style_guide_alignment.phase_orbs: Three floating orbs in diamond cages — boss phase markers for the player to destroy
style_guide_alignment.shadow_wings: Flat angular planes spreading from the back — oppressive shadow presence
style_guide_alignment.rune_glow: Violet emissive runes on chest and crown — corrupt power channels
style_guide_alignment.attack_tells: Red-violet claws and chest core glow before attacks

gameplay_job: Final boss encounter. Towering dark influence sovereign that tests all skills: charge reading (Berserker), reaction speed (Imp swarms), and phase-based orb destruction. Three phases, each removing one floating orb and changing attack patterns.
readability_requirement: Crown silhouette, tri-eye glow, phase orbs, and attack-tell claws must read from the default UE5 camera at boss-fight distance.
next_gate: Add to ASSET_MANIFEST, UE5 import, boss arena layout, phase behavior blueprint, Play-In-Editor boss fight test
